steps.action: Acknowledge incident and verify monitoring data
steps.description: Confirm alert validity by cross-referencing NMS, OTDR, and customer-reported symptoms.
Identify all affected services and customers. Calculate business impact score.
Run OTDR tests, check BER trends, review recent alarm history on affected path.
Based on diagnostics, choose between remote fix, field dispatch, or traffic reroute.

decision_options.condition: Software/config issue identified, no physical damage
Alternate path available, mitigation while investigating

steps.description: Apply the chosen fix: push config changes, dispatch field crew, or reroute traffic.
Confirm all affected services have returned to normal BER and performance levels.

steps.action: Close incident and document root cause
steps.description: Record root cause, actions taken, and any follow-up work orders needed.

escalation_criteria.condition: SLA response deadline within 30 minutes and unacknowledged
SLA resolution at 50% elapsed and no root cause identified
SLA resolution at 75% elapsed and fix not applied
Customer VIP flag set and impact > 100 services
